title: PMLA Tribunal Upholds Freezing of Bank Accounts & FDR in Manesar Land Scam; Lien or Bank Guarantee No Bar
description:
PMLA Tribunal upheld freezing of bank accounts and FDR linked to the Manesar land scam, ruling that lien or bank guarantee in favour of a government authority does not prevent attachment under PMLA.
The post PMLA Tribunal Upholds Freezing of Bank Accounts & FDR in Manesar Land Scam; Lien or Bank Guarantee No Bar appeared first on TaxGuru.
